title: Crypto Startups Say They Take Security Seriously… But Do They?
description:
Many crypto startups lack dedicated cybersecurity leadership. This panel explores the risks of that gap and outline the benefits of building a formal security program—before a breach forces the conversation.

Moderator:
Tiago Assumpcao, Technical Director, Crypto ISAC

Panelists:
- Ryan Wegner, Head of Security, Gauntlet Networks
- Joe Dobson, Threat Intelligence Analyst, Mandiant
- CvH, Security, Polygon
- Ido Ben-Natan, Founder and CEO, Blockaid

https://defisecuritysummit.org
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Auditorium Stage - Day 1
